case_title: FAZIO, JOE vs. OWAS, SALAM et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAZIO, JOE COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-28-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAZIO, JOE AS TO DEFENDANT OWAS, SALAM OWAS, BASSMA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT OWAS, SALAM OWAS, BASSMA
ORDER FOR WITHDRAWAL AND RECEIPT FOR EXHIBITS ATTORNEY FOR JOE FAZIO FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAZIO, JOE

DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:MARILYN NORMAN/CLERK:G. SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY CHARLES COLLINS PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFTS SALAM OWAS AND BASSMA OWAS PRESENT IN PRO-PER. COURT INSTRUCTS DEFTS TO SEEK PARTY TO INTERPRET ARABIC LANGUAGE WHEN THEY STATE THEY CANNOT UNDERSTAND PROCEEDINGS. RAYED TOMEH, FRIEND OF DEFTS, APPEARS TO INTERPRET. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY PLTF, ORAL EVIDENCE BY DEFTS. BOTH SIDES REST; REBUTTAL WITNESS CALLED BY PLTF. BOTH SIDES WAIVE CLOSING ARGUMENT. PLTF MOT TO AMEND DEFTS' NAMES ON COMPLAINT TO SALAM OWAIS AND BASMA OWAIS GRANTED. CASE STANDS SUBMITTED. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT OWAS, SALAM OWAS, BASSMA MONTHLY RENT REDUCED TO $579.34/MONTH IN UNTENANTABLE STATE. JUDGMNT BASED ON CONDITION THAT DEFTS PAY PLTF THE SUM OF $1158.68 IN BACK RENT ON/BEFORE 10-16-95 AT 5PM. IF NOT PAID JUDGMNT WILL BE ORDERED IN FAVOR OF PLTF FOR POSS & RESTITN OF PREMISES OF 1301 FELL ST. #5, $1158.68 DAMAGES & COSTS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
